summary: Promotes our-skills from a repository to a local skill platform with a marketplace index, install doctor, graph report, quality dashboard, release report sidecars, and lifecycle/deprecation policy.

requires.git: optional provenance source metadata and dashboard last-updated fields

includes: release marketplace index, quality dashboard, and graph report sidecars
deprecation policy with owner, status, deprecated, replaced_by, and migration_path metadata
one-command verification including platform report freshness and doctor strict checks
